description: Aviator is an engineering workflow platform focused on pull request operations, merge queues, releases, verification, and AI-assisted runbooks. It integrates with GitHub-centered development workflows and provides APIs for accessing and mutating Aviator resources.
summary: Aviator exposes a bearer-authenticated JSON API, a bearer-authenticated GraphQL API, and an `av` CLI for stacked PR workflows; docs also describe consuming third-party MCP servers inside Runbooks, but Aviator does not publish its own MCP server endpoint.
